title: Appointments of Senior Assistant Registrar and Assistant Registrars (Registrar-General's Office), 1960
title_en: Appointments of Senior Assistant Registrar and Assistant Registrars (Registrar-General's Office), 1960

provisions.content: With effect from the 1st day of July, 1960, the Senior Assistant Registrar and every Assistant Registrar in the office of the Registrar-General is hereby appointed to be— (a) an Assistant Registrar-General of Births and Deaths under section 5 of the Births and Deaths Registration Act 1 ; 1 Cap. 108 (b) a Deputy Registrar under section 3 of the Business Names (Registration) Act 2 ; 2 Cap. 213 (c) an Assistant Registrar under— (i) section 3 of the Chattels Transfer Act 3 ; 3 Cap. 210 (ii) section 292 of the Companies Act 4 ; 4 Cap. 212 (iii) section 2 of the Patents (Registration) Act 5 ; 5 Cap. 217 (iv) section 4 of the Land Registration Act 6 ; 6 Cap. 334 (v) section 3 of the Trade Marks Act 7 . 7 Cap. 394

The appointments of the Registry Superintendent and every Assistant Registry Superintendent in the office of the Registrar-General to be— (a) an Assistant Registrar-General of Births and Deaths; (b) a Deputy Registrar under the Business Names (Registration) Act 8 ; 8 Cap. 213 (c) an Assistant Registrar under— (i) the Registration of Documents Act 9 ; 9 Cap. 117 (ii) the Chattels Transfer Act 10 ; 10 Cap. 210 (iii) the Companies Act 11 ; 11 Cap. 212 (iv) the Patents (Registration) Act 12 ; 12 Cap. 217 (v) the Land Registration Act 13 ; 13 Cap. 334 (vi) the Trade Unions Act 14 ; 14 Cap. 394 (vii) the Trade Marks Act 15 , 15 G.N. No. 1443 of 1958 are hereby cancelled with effect from the 1st day of July, 1960.
